tools.name: list_protocols
tools.description: The protocol family and the resolve-once spine: ACM-SPARKS classifies, SM-ECO-10060 resolves, ACM-68000 signals.

tools.name: get_protocol
tools.description: Full canon record for ACM-SPARKS, SM-ECO-10060, or ACM-68000.

tools.name: list_signals
tools.description: All seven signals, enumerated individually: ACM-000, ACM-200, ACM-300, ACM-403, ACM-404, ACM-451, ACM-500. One meaning, no drift.

tools.name: resolve_signal
tools.description: The state and meaning of a single ACM-68000 signal code.

tools.name: list_sparks_dimensions
tools.description: SPARKS resolves six dimensions — SKU, Pack, Amount, Region, Kernel, and Standard — a CPG industry first.

tools.name: resolve_sparks_dimension
tools.description: Canon record for a single SPARKS dimension by letter (S, P, A, R, K, S2) or name.

tools.name: list_members
tools.description: The 49 sovereign jurisdictional member nodes — code, namespace, jurisdiction, region, and GS1 territory GTIN. Live supply/demand data per member is the CPG Knowledge Graph's job.

tools.name: resolve_member
tools.description: Canon record for a single sovereign member by ISO-style code, e.g. FR, AU, MX.

tools.name: get_header_canon
tools.description: The GSC wire-header canon (v3.2 — The Ghost Eighteen (locked July 18 2026)) — the eighteen x-gsc-* headers every GSC surface emits, in canon order. Curl-auditable against any live GSC surface.
